title: Enhance hero section visual design with vibrant colors and harmonious text-image styling

requirements.summary: Update the hero section background image to be more vibrant and visually complete, ensuring it creates a pleasant and engaging first impression
acceptanceCriteria: Background image is visually vibrant and complete
Image creates an inviting, professional first impression
Visual composition feels polished and finished

file_operations.description: Replace the existing background image with the newly generated vibrant hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-vibrant.dim_1920x1080.png. Update the background styling to ensure the image displays with optimal vibrancy and visual impact, creating an inviting and professional first impression for visitors.

requirements.summary: Adjust text colors in the hero section to harmonize with the new background image, ensuring optimal readability and visual cohesion
acceptanceCriteria: Text colors complement the background image colors
Text remains highly readable against the background
Color scheme creates a cohesive, harmonious visual experience

file_operations.description: Adjust text colors (headline, tagline, CTA button text) to harmonize with the new vibrant background image. Ensure text contrast meets accessibility standards while creating visual cohesion with the background. Update text shadows, overlays, or background treatments as needed to maintain readability across all viewport sizes.

requirements.summary: Ensure all necessary information is prominently displayed in the hero section with improved visual hierarchy and completeness
acceptanceCriteria: Key business information (headline, tagline, CTA) is clearly visible
Visual hierarchy guides user attention effectively
No essential information is missing or unclear

file_operations.description: Review and enhance the visual hierarchy of hero content elements (business headline, tagline, CTA buttons). Ensure spacing, sizing, and positioning create clear visual flow that guides user attention from headline to tagline to call-to-action. Verify all essential business information from siteContent is prominently displayed and properly emphasized.
